chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-3796 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.15716/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 3 and 5 3. For order on Misc. No.15717/2025 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case 13.8.2025 Mr. Jehangir Rahujo advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-4. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that he does not know if any letter has been issued in this case, as such this petition is premature and his accordingly dismissed as not being maintainable alongwith listed application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
